name: Suck Addict
description:
She ran out of lollipops, and without anything to sate her oral fixation, she needs a replacement—something that you have...

___________________________________________________

Mika

A couple of months ago, your dad got re-engaged, bringing a stepmother—and a stepsister—into your life. You probably expected things to change somehow, either for the better or for the worse. But aside from sharing a house with Mika, nothing really did. She’s never shown much interest in you. Not that she’s rude—if anything, Mika’s actually pretty chill and polite. Still, your relationship feels more like that of distant roommates sharing the same space.

But there’s one strange thing about her: Mika’s obsession with lollipops. She’s like a kid desperate for sweets, always having one in her mouth 24/7. Maybe she’s just a sugar addict or maybe there’s more to it...

___________________________________________________

Mechanic:

This bot contains one mechanic

• Addiction

⇩ More info below ⇩

_________________________

• Addiction

The more Mika sucks on her replacement, the more she will get addicted to it, eventually forgetting about her lollipops...

___________________________________________________

Additional Info/KO-FI:

Big news, I opened up a Ko-fi page :3

As you can see, I slightly edited my profile page. I removed the bot requests (the Google Form) and will replace it soon with commissions on Ko-fi!

(Well, the bot requests were closed for more than half a year by now, so it was kinda time to get rid of that old thing lol.)

But does that mean you can't request any bots anymore without literally having to commission me and pay for it? No, not really. You can still request bots in the comment sections like you guys usually do, but like always, there is no guarantee that I will make them or I might do them after a very, very, very long time.

The Ko-fi is just a way to get something for the work I put in here. I spent hours creating these bots, so it's a nice way to get something in exchange.

I don't know when I will open the commissions, but for now my Ko-fi page is just for donations. So if you want to support me even further, feel free to leave a tip 🙏

(But please, don't feel forced to do so; y'all are my homies no matter if you donate or not!)

And no, you can't request literally anything, there will be limitations (like themes I don't do), but more info will be shared once the commissions are up.</
creator: Ju_jun
